rows.label: tev000293_MSG0001
rows.name: A fine day to you, my friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0002
rows.name:
Look at the way this cat is staring
at us with such expectant eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0003
rows.name:
Perhaps it is aware that it has
reached its peak of quality, and
is eager to be cooked and eaten?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_JNK0010
rows.name: Intervene

rows.label: tev000293_SEL0011
rows.name: Insist that cats are not food.

rows.label: tev000293_JNK0020
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: tev000293_SEL0021
rows.name:
Explain to Lu that the cat
is probably just hungry.

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hmmm... We wondered why no one else
had beaten us to it. It is forbidden
to eat cats? Categorically?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0005
rows.name:
We mean no disrespect, but this human
custom strikes us as peculiar. After
all, you eat birds, do you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0006
rows.name:
Of course, we understand why you would
refrain from eating Nopon as the Bias do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0007
rows.name:
The Nopon are beings that are
capable of communicating with us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0008
rows.name:
But neither cats nor chickens can speak.
So then, what means do you use to determine
which are food and which are not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0009
rows.name:
So that expression is used to extract
food from humans? How interesting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0010
rows.name:
We must admit that we have yet to make
a proper study of these creatures, and
there is much we do not understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0011
rows.name:
For example, we are confused as to why humans
regard these creatures with affection while
showing little regard to others—such as chickens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0012
rows.name:
Are some to be eaten and others not? On
what basis do you make that distinction?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_JNK0030
rows.name: Evade

rows.label: tev000293_SEL0031
rows.name:
Answer that different cultures
have different customs.

rows.label: tev000293_JNK0040
rows.name: Admit

rows.label: tev000293_SEL0041
rows.name:
Explain to Lu how humans usually care
more about cute-looking animals.

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0013
rows.name:
How interesting. So even within
humanity, different cultures
create different rules.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0014
rows.name:
It's all so terribly vague and difficult
for us xenoforms to understand. But
perhaps that is typical of humanity?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0015
rows.name:
We see. But even that is a
highly subjective distinction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0016
rows.name:
Then again, perhaps that
is typical of humanity?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0017
rows.name:
Well, different strikes for
different blokes, as you say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0018
rows.name:
This diversity seems to be one of
humanity's defining features.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0019
rows.name:
For example, our inventions occasionally have minor
defects that may lead to suboptimal user experiences,
such as electrocution or severe burns.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0020
rows.name:
When we upset a Ma-non, we give the complainant
a pizza and all is forgiven. But humans are
seldom mollified by cheese-covered dough disks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0021
rows.name:
Instead, we must listen to each
human's grievances and respond
individually. It's quite tiresome.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0022
rows.name:
But ultimately, humanity is stronger
for such diversity. It's what gives
you such limitless potential.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0023
rows.name:
We would like to learn more about
humanity, to witness the breadth
of your potential firsthand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0024
rows.name:
Perhaps rearing a cat would give us some
valuable insight into this matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000293_MSG0025
rows.name:
And as you humans say, he who hesitates is a loser.
We will speak to Defense Secretary Nagi and ask
him to requisition a cat for us immediately![ST:wait ]
